meta.description: V5.4 Experience System — UI/UX Real Product Conversion

elements: seal icon (爱 character in gold border)
poetic verse: 每一处探索，都是重逢 (26rpx, soft white)
single gold CTA button: 开始探索 (dominant, 360rpx wide, breathe animation)
minimal stats: 信物 count + 礼遇 count (removed completionRate %)
4 entry cards with soft-blur glass background
each card: icon (colored circle) + title + one-line desc + '进入' pill
cards: 探索地图 · 我的信物 · 权益中心 · 个人中心
each scene: themed dot (mist/fog/light/stone/seal) + name + hint
3 placeholder relic cards (purely visual, no logic)
each card: aura glow + material body + symbol + name + context
materials: jade / stone / jade with distinct colors

style_changes_applied: background: deep green gradient top → warm beige bottom (linear-gradient 180deg)
glass card style: rgba(255,255,255,0.55-0.72) + backdrop-filter blur
buttons: warm gold gradient (#f0e2c4 → #e8d8b4) + breathe animation
shadows: very subtle rgba(15,42,34,0.03-0.04), no hard borders
stats simplified from 3 pills (包括 completionRate %) to 2 inline stats
skeleton: simplified to 1 hero + 3 card placeholders (was 6+ blocks)
removed flat gray pill borders, removed sharp border styles

text_simplifications_detail.original: 每一处探索，都是与这片土地的一次重逢。
event_name up to 11 chars (爱企谷初见寻宝节)
星点图谱 · 印记路径
收藏册 · 已显现的印记

removed_engine_elements: completionRate % counter (removed from hero stats — technical feel)
3-column stat pills with gray borders (replaced by 2 inline stat labels)
dense path links list with arrows (replaced by 4 glass entry cards)
full recommended point card with address + relic name (replaced by 3-scene scroll)
echo panel (今日回响) removed — was too verbose
proto- classes removed from page (replaced by v54- product naming)

notes: Single gold CTA button is clearly the primary action
Glass card style removes harsh technical feel
Deep green-to-beige gradient provides atmospheric continuity
Stats reduced to 2 essential numbers (relic + rights count)
Exploration entries with '进入' pills guide user to next actions
Relic preview cards are purely decorative — no fake logic attached
